interactive.rationale: Focus buttons and an invalid-keyword button now update a live computed-style readout.

references.rationale: The 'see also' section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5082469066604544 — matches the feature.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles route through --bg/--text/--accent variables, no raw hex, and button overrides pair background + color correctly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the keywords the spec/feature-index lede surfaces — covers the headline API surface.

edge_cases.rationale: The page visibly demonstrates that blink is rejected and that auto/manual are the supported values.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: clicked focus auto input, focus manual input, and try invalid keyword. Computed caret-animation was auto/manual, setting blink was rejected, CSS.supports('caret-animation: blink') was false, and console/network were clean.
